# 2026 Goals

## Health

- Run a 5k by June
- Sleep 7+ hours consistently
- Build a sustainable strength training routine

## Learning

Deepen understanding of distributed systems and local-first software architecture. Read at least one technical book per quarter.

## Projects

Ship vault-semantic-search as a usable tool by end of Q1. Write at least three posts for the vibe-coded series.
